title: Webinar: Share the (monday.com) love! How to share your boards and templates with other users and accounts
excerpt: Have you ever wanted to share your board templates with another monday․com user outside of your account? Learn how to share your monday․com templates and boards in just a few minutes with other monday accounts and users.…

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you ever wanted to share your board templates with another monday․com user outside of your account? Learn how to share your monday․com templates and boards in just a few minutes with other monday accounts and users. During this webinar, we’ll walk you through how to set up a shareable link for your boards, what you should know about how it works, and then open the floor for Q&A.

Join Polished Geek for this free webinar and start sharing the monday․com love!
Wednesday, May 19, 2021 12:00 PM Eastern USA time

https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1116209252925/WN_2Swvp8wmTVObRO1xmQL0rw
